caption: The video features a man standing on stage, addressing an audience with a microphone in front of him. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery. A decorative necklace with a red pendant hangs around his neck. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a conference room or a lecture hall. The audience, visible in the foreground, appears attentive, with several heads turned towards the speaker. The scene conveys a formal atmosphere, likely part of a presentation or speech. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, indicating the event's affiliation or sponsorship.
